summary: Testing of User Impersonate and Auth Provider Badge features completed successfully. All 9 test scenarios passed. Backend API tests (7/7 passed) and Frontend UI tests all verified working correctly.

impersonate_endpoint.success_case: PASS - Returns access_token and user data
impersonate_endpoint.super_admin_target_blocked: PASS - Returns 400 when trying to impersonate a super admin

audit_logging.impersonate_logged: PASS - Impersonation action logged in audit log with IMPERSONATE action type

auth_provider_badges.users_table_auth_column: PASS - Auth column exists with EMAIL badges displayed
auth_provider_badges.user_control_room_badge: PASS - Auth Provider: EMAIL badge displayed in Info & Profilo tab
auth_provider_badges.badge_styling: PASS - renderAuthBadge function renders correct badge styles for 'email' provider

impersonate_button_ui.button_visible: PASS - 'Accedi come [username]' button visible in User Control Room for non-super-admin users

test_scenarios_verified: 1. Navigate to Admin UI > Utenti and verify 'Auth' column exists in the users table - PASS (117 EMAIL badges found)
2. Open User Control Room for CleanUserA and verify 'Auth Provider: EMAIL' badge is displayed in Info & Profilo tab - PASS
3. Verify 'Accedi come CleanUserA' impersonate button is visible in User Control Room Info tab - PASS
4. Test POST /api/admin/impersonate/{user_id} backend endpoint returns access_token and user data - PASS
5. Test POST /api/admin/impersonate/{user_id} is blocked for non-super-admin users (returns 403) - PASS
6. Test POST /api/admin/impersonate/{admin_user_id} is blocked when trying to impersonate a super admin (returns 400) - PASS
7. Verify impersonation is logged in audit log (GET /api/rbac/users/{admin_id}/audit-log) - PASS
8. Verify renderAuthBadge function renders correct badge styles for 'email' provider - PASS
9. Verify tab switching in User Control Room still works after changes - PASS (all 4 tabs switch correctly)
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Impersonate and Auth Provider Badge features fully implemented and working. The impersonate button opens a new browser tab with the impersonated user's token as URL parameter. Auth badges support email, google, apple, facebook providers with colored styling. The renderAuthBadge() function in admin_ui.py (lines 1032-1041) handles the badge rendering with appropriate colors per provider type.
